raw: {"questions":[{"label":"What’s on your mind","name":"What’s been most on your mind at work lately, Sarah?","description":"Safe opener that lets Sarah set the context before any feedback lands.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Impact beyond shipping","name":"When you look at the last quarter, where did your work change a decision or outcome beyond the analysis itself?","description":"Surfaces whether she is framing impact in business terms rather than only delivered work.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stakeholder signal","name":"How did you decide when to bring stakeholders into the loop on the work?","description":"Tests whether she is raising signal proactively instead of waiting for others to notice.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Senior bar","name":"What does strong Senior-level performance look like in your role right now?","description":"Checks her mental model of the performance bar for her level.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visibility gap","name":"Where do you think your current approach is least visible to the people who matter?","description":"Surfaces the specific visibility gap without framing it as a failure.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Cross-team friction","name":"What tends to slow you down most when priorities clash with another team?","description":"Gets concrete on how she handles cross-functional friction and tradeoffs.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Escalation pattern","name":"How do you decide when to escalate a cross-functional disagreement?","description":"Probes judgment around coordination moves at Senior scope.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Execution bias","name":"What do you think pulls you toward execution over influence in the moment?","description":"Explores whether the pattern is habit, context, or a deliberate tradeoff.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Raise signal plan","name":"What would you change in how you communicate so stakeholders see the work earlier?","description":"Forces a practical plan for raising signal rather than relying on good work being noticed.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-step focus","name":"Given what we’ve covered, what is the one change you want to make first?","description":"Closes on a concrete priority and commitment from the conversation.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
